generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for measuring position of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox for measuring position of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M) for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorIDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time position data transmitted via MQTT protocol from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time secondary position data transmitted via MQTT protocol from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorIDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time motor current (I_M) data transmitted via MQTT protocol from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured secondary position data from secondary position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, SysMLEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrentIData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current (I_M) data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorIDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from motor current and position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorIDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedMotorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Simulated motor data within digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorModel
]

instance SimulatedGearwheelDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Simulated gearwheel data within digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearwheelModel
]

instance SimulatedGearboxDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

instance SimulatedCoulombViscousFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Simulated Coulomb-Viscous friction data within digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CoulombViscousFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedStribeckFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Simulated Stribeck friction data within digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom StribeckFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedDahlFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Simulated Dahl friction data within digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DahlFrictionModel
]

instance SimulatedLuGreFrictionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LuGreFrictionModel
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationTool

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation and model execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, MultiPhysicsAnalysisService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetManagementService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTransmissionService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling using SysML for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelingInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of white-box and black-box friction models using live data"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Multi-physics-aware analysis of robot motion dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:provides JointFrictionDynamicsInsight
]

instance AssetManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset management using Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetManagementInsight
]

instance DataTransmissionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data transmission via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTransmissionInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardVisualizationInsight
]

instance JointFrictionDynamicsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction dynamics for improving robot motion accuracy"
]

instance DashboardVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [

]

instance AssetManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Asset status and management insights"
]

instance DataTransmissionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data transmission status insights"
]

instance StructuralModelingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System architecture insights from SysML models"
]

]

    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC system controlling the first axis for machining applications"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction; digital shadow operates as a passive entity with one-way data flow only from physical to virtual."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live data streams; no specific frequency mentioned."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, and a unified dashboard for friction analysis and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), utilizing live data during robot operation for friction analysis."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data; parameters derived from manufacturer specifications; no explicit uncertainty quantification methods detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for interoperability; no specific external systems integration detailed."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "SysML modeling standard and Asset Administration Shells (AAS) within Industry 4.0 framework."
]
